headline: AI, connectivity demands make next-gen Wi-Fi a priority for more building operators
summary: Many organizations view Wi-Fi as a strategic growth engine, but complexity challenges remain, according to a report by Cisco.

headline: Ivonescimab Receives Major Recommendations Across Multiple Therapies in the 2026 CSCO NSCLC Guideline
summary: Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) ("Akeso" or the "Company") today announced that ivonescimab, the company's first-in-class PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, has secured multiple authoritative updates and upgrades across first-line and later-line settings in the officially updated 2026 Chinese Society of Clinical Oncology (CSCO) Guideline for the Diagnosis and Treatment of Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC).
